name: luxe-en-vogue-checkout
description: Requires PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY (and optionally PUBLIC_BASE_URL) as env vars — see /api/create-checkout-session.js. Order storage uses Vercel KV (Upstash Redis) — KV_REST_API_URL / KV_REST_API_TOKEN, auto-set once a KV store is attached (Storage tab -> Create Database -> KV -> Connect Project). ADMIN_SECRET guards /api/all-orders and /api/update-order-status. Sign up / sign in (session-based, stored in the same Vercel KV store) needs GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET for 'Continue with Google' — see /api/auth/[action].js, a single consolidated serverless function (Vercel dynamic route) handling signup/login/logout/session/google/google-callback, kept as one function to stay under the Hobby plan's 12-function-per-deployment limit. Google's authorized redirect URI must be set to https://<your-domain>/api/auth/google-callback. No new npm dependencies were added: password hashing uses Node's built-in crypto.scrypt and the Google OAuth exchange uses plain fetch calls.
